summary: Comprehensive testing of Live Signals Page feature. All 10 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - LiveSignalsPage renders correctly with mode-aware badges, stats bar, and signal feed. Navigation shows 'Live Signals' link for logged-in users. Toast notifications removed from WebSocket handler.

issues: React key warnings: 'Encountered two children with the same key' for SOL, ETH, BTC - minor issue, not blocking

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Dashboard has React key warnings for duplicate keys (SOL, ETH, BTC) - should use unique keys like `${symbol}-${index}` or timestamp
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live Signals Page feature is fully functional. Backend endpoint GET /api/alerts/live returns mode-aware data (real signals in LIVE mode, demo signals in DEMO mode). Frontend LiveSignalsPage at /live-signals shows: LIVE/DEMO badge, stats bar (Total Signals, Long, Short counts), signal feed with action/asset/confidence/agent/price/time. Navigation shows 'Live Signals' link in primaryItems for logged-in users. Alerts page moved to overflowItems (accessible via More menu). Toast notifications removed from useStrategyAlerts.js WebSocket handler - signals are now only displayed on the Live Signals page.

backend_api: GET /api/alerts/live returns 200 with alerts array - PASS
Alert object structure has all required fields (action, asset, message, confidence, price, strategy_name, timestamp, is_demo) - PASS
LIVE mode returns alerts with is_demo=false - PASS
DEMO mode returns alerts with is_demo=true - PASS
POST /api/system/mode can switch to demo - PASS
POST /api/system/mode can switch to live - PASS
frontend_ui: LiveSignalsPage shows 'LIVE' badge when system is in live mode - PASS
LiveSignalsPage shows 'DEMO' badge when system is in demo mode - PASS
LiveSignalsPage shows stats bar: Total Signals, Long, Short counts - PASS
LiveSignalsPage signal rows show action, asset, confidence, agent, price, time - PASS
No toast notifications fire when WebSocket receives strategy_alert - PASS (verified in code and UI test)
Navigation shows 'Live Signals' link for logged-in users - PASS
Dashboard page loads without signal toasts appearing - PASS
/alerts page still accessible via More menu - PASS
